title: MOU WITH VIVO-INDUSTRIAL READINESS PROGRAM (IRP)
content: This Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) between Galgotias University and Vivo establishes a mutual understanding between the Parties to collaborate on an Industrial Readiness Program (IRP) aimed at enhancing the employability and industry exposure of students. The program will focus on providing practical and skill development training to students while bridging the gap between academic learning and industry requirements. Through this collaboration, students will benefit from opportunities such as internships, industrial visits, guest lectures, and participation in joint projects, thereby gaining valuable real-world insights and hands-on experience.
